params.name: Dream Control System
params.description:
On May 9, 2010 AD, a group of dream thieves snuck into their target's dream through the dream control system.
The Dream Control System enables its users to actively sneak into other people's dreams and steal them. In the dream, the thieves gain superhuman strength, whether that means they can distort gravity or change the terrain. If they dream in a dream, you can also sneak into the deeper dream and dig into the dreamer's subconscious. The price is that if you die in the dream, you may get l …
